title: LangGraph Basics
description: Learn the fundamentals of LangGraph through 5 progressive examples

examples.title: Hello State
examples.description: Your first LangGraph - learn state, nodes, and basic graph structure

examples.title: Two Nodes
examples.description: Understand how data flows between multiple nodes in sequence

examples.title: LLM Node
examples.description: Use language models in your graphs to generate responses

examples.title: Conditional Edge
examples.description: Use conditional routing to create dynamic, branching flows

examples.title: Simple Agent
examples.description: Build a complete conversational agent combining all concepts
